creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text: I'm confused. I see it now builds with LLVM80, but it's still the old version 18. How is that "FIXED" for a request to update to 19.0. I've been running 19.0.0 for several months wit no problems, so I've been hoping to see this or an updated version for 19.0.8 to be committed, not to see the ticket closed as "FIXED".
